Crown Rush 42

Conquer the Course Like Royalty

Price
$450
Status
Available Now
Category
Large Inflatable
Duration
Private parties: up to 6 hrs · Events: up to 4 hrs
Dimensions
12.8m x 2.5m x 3.66m / 42ft x 8.2ft x 12ft
Use type
Wet-use

Crown Rush 42 is a large water slide and obstacle course combo built for high-energy fun. It is ideal for bigger birthdays, school events, larger yards, and community celebrations.

Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.

Features

  • 42ft water slide
  • Obstacle course style fun
  • High-energy attraction
  • Large visual impact

Best For

  • Big birthdays
  • Schools
  • Larger events
  • Community events

Setup Notes

  • Large clear level setup area required
  • Power access required
  • Water source required for wet use
  • Adult supervision required at all times

Check availability for Crown Rush 42
